ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parks" (
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each park */,
  "site_address" TEXT /* Full address of the park */,
  "license_holder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the license holder associated with the park */,
  "number_of_units" INTEGER /* Number of units available in the park */,
  "planning_date" TEXT /* Date of planning and reference for the park */,
  "license_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the license or site rules */,
  "gis_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic information system (GIS) coordinates for the park */,
  "park_type" TEXT /* Type of park (e.g., national, regional, local) */,
  "facilities" TEXT /* Facilities available in the park (e.g., toilets, parking, playgrounds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("park_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parks_license_holder_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_holder_id") REFERENCES license_holders ("license_holder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "license_holders" (
  "license_holder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license holder */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name or organization name of the license holder */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the license holder */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Name of the organization (if applicable) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the license holder */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the license holder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_holder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "planning_references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each planning reference */,
  "planning_date" TEXT /* Date associated with the planning reference */,
  "reference_number" TEXT /* Planning reference number for official documentation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or conditions regarding the planning */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL to the planning reference document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site rule */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated park */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the rule applied at the site */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the rule becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the rule expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park the application is for */,
  "license_holder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the license holder applying for the license */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of application (e.g., new, renewal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_license_holder_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_holder_id") REFERENCES license_holders ("license_holder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being tracked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application at the time of change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was changed */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* Username of the staff member who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_history_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "park_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., manager, assistant) */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the park they are assigned to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_park_staff_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "park_visitors" (
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visitor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the visitor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the visitor */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the park visited */,
  "visit_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the visit (e.g., recreational, educational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park associated with the license */,
  "license_holder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the license holder for the license */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the license was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the license expires */,
  "license_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the license type (e.g., commercial, non-commercial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_license_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_type_id") REFERENCES license_types ("license_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "license_types" (
  "license_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the license type (e.g., commercial, non-commercial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the license type */,
  "fee" TEXT /* Fee associated with the license type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park where the check was conducted */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance check */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Result of the compliance check (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the compliance check */,
  "checked_by" TEXT /* Username of the staff member who conducted the check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for staff login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the account */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member associated with the account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES park_staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message content */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., reminder, alert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES park_staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change was made */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* Username of the staff member who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
